title: cyperus ochraceus
intro: Cyperus ochraceus, also known as yellow papyrus or ochre-flowered flatsedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus ochraceus include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
